note.zh: Claude Sonnet 5(Max 思考档位)在 Claude Code 中用仓库标准中文提示词(仅按案例规则填写文末【本次运行】占位符)一次生成的圈地智能体,未经人工修改。按案例规则策略文件不公开、仅注册运行,由维护者亲自执行,任何 bug 均不修复。自命名「卷地风」。诊断:全程 0 次成功圈地,反复送死 11 次——离开领地后撞上自己的尾巴/岩石/边界而亡,一个闭环都没画成。属于莽夫送死型:太急、路径规划没避开自身尾巴。
note.en: One-shot Turf War agent by Claude Sonnet 5 (Max effort) in Claude Code from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt (only the [This run] placeholders filled per case rules), with no human edits. Per case rules the policy file is unpublished and no bug is ever fixed; this registers the maintainer-executed run. Self-named "卷地风". Diagnosis: Zero completed captures and 11 self-inflicted deaths — it leaves home and dies on its own trail / a rock / the border before ever closing a loop. A reckless death-loop: too eager, its pathing never avoids its own trail.
